Izi ndi nthawi zitatu zokhala panokha. Palibe chifukwa kwa inu kapena kwa iwo kuchezerana, wina ndi mnzake mu nthawi zina kupatula nthawi zimene zatchulidwazi. Kotero Mulungu amaulula poyera chivumbulutso chake kwa inu. Ndipo Mulungu ndi Wodziwa ndi Waluntha
24_59: Ndipo pamene ana akula msinkhu, alekeni kuti apemphe chilolezo chanu monga akuluakulu awo amachitira. Kotero ndi mmene Mulungu amaululira chivumbulutso chake kwa inu. Ndipo Mulungu ndi wodziwa ndi waluntha
24_60: Sichidzakhala cholakwa kwa amayi okalamba amene alibe maganizo a ukwati ngati angasiye zovala zawo zakunja popanda kuonetsa kukongola kwawo. Kungakhale bwino ngati iwo angavale modzilemekeza. Ndipo Mulungu ndi wakumva ndi wodziwa
24_61: Si cholakwa ngati munthu wakhungu kapena wolumala kapena wodwala kapena inu eni ake mudya m’nyumba zanu kapena m’nyumba za atate anu kapena m’nyumba za amayi anu kapena m’nyumba za achimwene anu kapena m’nyumba za alongo anu kapena m’nyumba za achimwene a atate anu kapena alongo awo atate anu kapena m’nyumba za amalume anu kapena m’nyumba za achemwali a amayi anu kapena m’nyumba zimene makiyi ake mwasunga kapena aliyense m’nyumba za abwenzi anu. Palibe cholakwa kwa inu ngati mudya pamodzi kapena payekha payekha. Pamene mulowa m’nyumba, lonjeranani wina ndi mnzake malonje odalitsika ochokera kwa Mulungu. Kotero Mulungu ali kukufotokozerani zizindikiro kuti mukhoza kukhala ozindikira
24_62: Ndi okhawo amene ali ndi chikhulupiriro, amene amakhulupirira mwa Mulungu ndi Mtumwi wake ndipo amati akasonkhana pamodzi ndi iye pa zinthu zofunika sachoka mpaka pamene apempha chilolezo chake. Ndithudi anthu amene amakupempha chilolezo ndiwo amene amakhulupirira mwa Mulungu ndi Mtumwi wake. Pamene akupempha iwe chilolezo choti achoke ndi cholinga chokagwira ntchito zawo, pereka chilolezo kwa aliyense amene iwe wamufuna ndipo mumupemphe Mulungu kuti awakhululukire machimo awo. Mulungu amakhululukira ndipo ndi wachisoni chosatha
24_63: Musamuitane Mtumwi pomutchula dzina monga momwe mumaitanirana wina ndi mnzake. Mulungu amadziwa ena a inu amene amazemba ndi kuchoka pakati panu. Aleke onse amene samvera Mtumwi kuti achenjere mwina mayesero kapena chilango chowawa chikhoza kugwa pa iwo
24_64: Ndithudi mwini wake wa chilichonse chimene chili kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi ndi Mulungu. Ndithudi Iye amadziwa zonse zimene zili m’mitima mwanu. Ndipo patsiku limene iwo adzabwerera kwa Iye, Iye adzawauza zonse zimene amachita. Ndipo Mulungu amadziwa chinthu china chilichonse
25_1: Alemekezeke Iye amene adavumbulutsa Korani kwa Mtumwi wake kuti akhoza kuchenjeza mitundu ya anthu
25_2: Iye ndiye Mfumu ya kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi. Iye ndiye amene sadabereke mwana ndipo alibe wothandizana naye mu Ufumu wake. Iye ndiye amene adalenga zinthu zonse ndipo adakhazikitsa mmene zili ndi mapeto ake
25_3: Komabe anthu osakhulupirira amapembedza milungu ina yoonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni imene siingathe kulenga china chilichonse chifukwa chakuti nayonso idachita kulengedwa. Ndi imene singathe kuwathandiza kapena kuwaononga ndiponso imene ilibe mphamvu pa nkhani zokhudza imfa kapena moyo kapena kuukitsa anthu akufa
25_4: Anthu osakhulupirira amanena kuti, “Zonsezi ndi zinthu zabodza zimene wapeka yekha, ndiponso anthu ena amamuthandiza. Zonse zimene watulutsa ndi zopanda pake ndipo zabodza
25_5: Ndipo iwo amati, “Izi ndi nkhani zopanda pake za anthu amakedzana zimene iye walemba. Izo zimalembetsedwa kwa Iye m’mawa ndi masana aliwonse.”
25_6: Nena, “Wavumbulutsa ndiye amene amadziwa zinsinsi za kumwamba ndi za padziko lapansi. Iye amakhululukira ndipo ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha.”
25_7: Iwo amanena kuti, “Uyu, ndi Mtumwi wotani amene amadya ndipo amayendayenda ku msika? Kodi bwanji mngelo sanathe kutumizidwa pansi pamodzi ndi iye kudzatichenjeza ife?”
25_8: “Nanga ndi chifukwa chiyani sadapatsidwe chuma ndipo alibe munda woti azipezako chakudya?” Ndipo anthu ochita zoipa amati, “Ndithudi munthu amene muli kumutsatira ndi wolodzedwa.”
25_9: Taona mafanizo amene amakupatsa iwe! Iwo asochera ndipo sangathe kubwerera kunjira yoyenera
25_10: Alemekezeke Iye amene, ngati afuna akhoza kukupatsa iwe zinthu zabwino kuposa zimenezi monga minda yothiriridwa ndi madzi a m’mitsinje ndi nyumba zachifumu
25_11: Iyayi. Iwo amakana ola lachiweruzo, ndipo iwo amene amakana olali, Ife tawakonzera moto woyaka
25_12: Pamene idzawaona iwo kuchokera kutali, iwo adzamva mkokomo wake
25_13: Ndipo onse akadzamangidwa limodzi, adzaponyedwa kumalo opanikizika. Ndithudi iwo adzafuna imfa itadza pa iwo
25_14: Lero musaitane imfa imodzi yokha ayi koma itanani imfa zambiri
25_15: Nena, “Kodi chimenecho ndi chabwino kapena Paradiso yosatha imene anthu angwiro adalonjezedwa?” Imeneyo ndiyo mphotho yawo ndi kobwerera kwawo
25_16: Iwo adzapeza m’menemo zonse zimene anali kufuna ndi kukhala momwemo. Limenelo ndilo lonjezo limene ndi lofunika kumapempha pafupipafupi kuchokera kwa Ambuye wako
25_17: Patsiku limene Iye adzawasonkhanitsa onse ndi zomwe amapembedza kuonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni ndipo Iye adzati, “Kodi ndinu amene munasocheza akapolo anga kapena ndi iwo okha anasochera ku njira yoyenera?”
25_18: Iwo adzati, “Ulemerero ukhale kwa Inu! Si koyenera kwa ife kuti tisankhe otisamalira ena oonjezera pa Inu. Koma Inu mudawapatsa iwo ndi makolo awo zinthu zokoma za dziko, kotero kuti iwo adaiwala chenjezo lanu ndipo adali anthu oonongeka.”
25_19: Kotero iwo adatsutsa mawu anu ndipo inu simungathe kuthawa kapena kupeza chithandizo ndipo aliyense amene ndi wosalungama pakati panu, Ife tidzamupatsa chilango chachikulu
25_20: Ife sitidatumizepo Atumwi kale amene sanali kudya ndi kuyenda m’misika. Ife tidakupangani ena a inu kukhala mayesero a ena. Kodi simungapirire? Ambuye wanu amaona chilichonse
25_21: Iwo amene alibe chikhulupiriro choti adzakumana ndi Ife amati, “Kodi ndi chifukwa chiyani angelo sadatumizidwe kwa ife? Kapena ndi chifukwa chiyani kuti ife sitingaone Ambuye wathu?” Ndithudi iwo adadzikweza kwambiri
25_22: Patsiku limene iwo adzaona angelo, anthu ochita zoipa sadzasangalala ayi ndipo iwo adzati, “Ambuye wathu! Ikani malire pakati pa ife ndi iwo.”
25_23: Ndipo Ife tidzabweretsa zonse zimene adachita ndikuzionetsa kuti ndi zinthu zopanda ntchito ngati fumbi louluka
25_24: Anthu okhala ku Paradiso, adzakhala kumalo abwino patsiku limeneli ndiponso malo abwino opumulako
25_25: Patsiku limeneli kumwamba pamodzi ndi mitambo yake idzagawanika pakati ndipo angelo adzatumizidwa pansi pano m’maudindo awo
25_26: Patsiku limeneli ufumu wonse udzakhala wa Mwini chisoni chosatha. Limeneli lidzakhala tsiku lovuta kwambiri kwa anthu osakhulupirira
25_27: Patsiku limeneli munthu ochita zoipa adzanong’oneza bombono nati, “Oh zikadakhala bwino ndikadakhala kuti ndidatsatira zimene Mtumwi anali kunena!”
25_28: “oh kalanga ine! Ndikadakhala kuti sindidasankhe a uje ndi a uje kuti akhale anzanga!”
25_29: “Mosakayika ndiwo amene adandisokoneza ine kuti ndisakhulupirire machenjezo a Mulungu pamene machenjezowo atandifika. Ndithudi Satana ndi wachinyengo nthawi zonse kwa munthu.”
25_30: Mtumwi adati, “Ambuye wanga! Ndithudi anthu anga alikana Buku la Korani.”
25_31: Motero Ife tapanga kwa Mtumwi aliyense mdani kuchokera kwa anthu ochimwa, anthu otsutsana naye, ndipo Ambuye wako ali wokwana kukhala wokutsogolera mu zabwino ndiponso ngati wokuthandiza wako
25_32: Anthu osakhulupirira anati, “Kodi ndi chifukwa chiyani Korani yonse siidavumbulutsidwe kwa iye nthawi imodzi?” Ife talivumbulutsa kotero kuti tikhoza kulimbikitsa mtima wako ndipo takupatsa ilo kwa iwe mu chivumbulutso chapang’onopang’ono
25_33: Iwo sadzatha kubwera ndi mtsutso umene Ife sitidakonze yankho loona ndi kafotokozedwe kake
25_34: Iwo adzaduduluzidwa cha mphumi kupita ku Gahena ndipo iwo adzakhala ndi malo oipa okhalamo ndipo njira yawo ndi yosochera
25_35: Ndithudi Ife tidavumbulutsa mawu a Mulungu kwa Mose ndipo tidamupatsa m’bale wake Aroni kuti akhale nduna yomuthandiza
25_36: Tidawauza iwo kuti, “Pitani nonse kwa anthu amene adakana zizindikiro zathu” ndipo pambuyo pake tidawaononga kotheratu
25_37: Akakhala anthu a Nowa, tidawamiza pamene iwo adakana Atumwi awo ndipo tidawapanga iwo kukhala phunziro kwa anthu a mitundu yonse. Ndipo anthu ochimwa tawakonzera chilango chowawa
25_38: Mitundu ya anthu a ku Thamoud ndi Aad nawonso tidawaononga ndiponso iwo amene anali kukhala ku Raas ndi mibadwo yochuluka imene idadza pakati pawo
25_39: Ndipo onsewa, tidawapatsa zitsanzo ndipo onse tidawaononga kotheratu
25_40: Ndithudi anthu osakhulupirira adadutsa pa mzinda umene udaonongeka ndi madzi a mvula. Kodi iwo sadauone mzindawu? Komabe iwo adalibe chikhulupiriro mu kuukanso kwa akufa
25_41: Nthawi zonse akakuona iwe amakunyoza ndipo amati, “Kodi uyu ndiye munthu amene akuti Mulungu wamutumiza ngati Mtumwi wake?”
25_42: Ngati ife tikadapanda kulimba popembedza milungu yathu ndithudi iye akadatitembenuza ife kuti tisiye milungu yathu. Koma posakhalitsa iwo adzaona chilango ndipo adzadziwa kuti ndani amene adasochera kwambiri
25_43: Kodi wamuona iye amene amayesa zilakolako zake ngati milungu? Kodi iwe ungakhale munthu wosamalira munthu wotere
25_44: Kodi iwe umaganiza kuti ambiri a iwo angathe kumva kapena kuzindikira? Iwo si chinthu china chilichonse koma ali ngati nyama yosochera kwambiri
25_45: Kodi iwe siuona mmeneAmbuye wako amatambasulira mthunzi? Mulungu akadafuna, akadaupanga kuti ukhale wokhazikika. Ndipo Ife tapanga dzuwa kukhala chizindikiro chake
25_47: Ndiyeamenewapanga usiku kukhala chofunda ndi tulo kuti tikhale mpumulo, ndipo wapanga usana kuti uzikhala nthawi yodzuka ndi kumagwira ntchito
25_48: Ndiye amene amatumiza mphepo ngati mthenga wobweretsa chisomo chake ndipo timatumiza madzi abwino kuchokera kumwamba
25_49: Ndi cholinga choti tipereke moyo ku nthaka imene inali yakufa ndi kuti timwetse zinthu zimene talenga, nyama ndi anthu ambiri
25_50: Ndithudi tawatumizira pakati pawo, kuti akhoza kukumbukira, chisomo cha Mulungu koma anthu ambiri amakana. Ndipo iwo amasankha kusakhulupirira
25_51: Chikadakhala chifuniro chathu, tikadautsa wowachenjeza ku mzinda uliwonse
25_52: Iwe usawamvere anthu osakhulupirira koma limbana nawo kwambiri pogwiritsa ntchito Korani ino
25_53: Ndiye amene adatumiza nyanja ziwiri, ina yamadzi ozuna ndi abwino pamene ina ndi yamadzi a mchere ndi owawa ndipo adakhazikitsa malire olimba kwambiri pakati pa nyanjazi
25_54: Ndiye amene adamulenga munthu kuchokera ku madzi ndipo adamupatsa abale chifukwa cha magazi amodzi ndiponso chifukwa cha ukwati. Ndipo Ambuye wako ndiye mwini mphamvu zonse ndipo amachita zimene afuna
25_55: Komabe anthu osakhulupirira amapembedza mafano moonjezerapa Mulungu Mafanowosangathekuwathandiza kapena kuwaononga. Munthu wosakhulupirira amathandiza Satana kuchita zoipa zosakomera Ambuye wake
25_56: Ndipo takutumiza iwe ngati wobweretsa nkhani yabwino ndiponso munthu wopereka chenjezo
25_57: Nena, “Ine sindili kukupemphani malipiro pa ntchito iyi ayi kupatula kuti iye amene afuna atsatire njira yoyenera yopita kwa Ambuye wake.”
25_58: Ndipo ika chikhulupiriro chako mwa Iye wa moyo amene sakufa ayi. Ndipo mulemekeze nthawi zonse. Iye ndi okwana chifukwa Iye amadziwa bwinobwino za machimo a akapolo ake
25_59: Iye adalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi ndi zonse zimene zili m’menemo masiku asanu ndi limodzi. Ndipo atatero adabuka pa chimpando chaufumu, Mwini Chisononi chosatha. Motero mufunse Iye chifukwa amadziwa china chili chonse
25_60: Pamene zimanenedwa kwa iwo kuti, “Lambirani Mwini chisoni chosatha,” Iwo amati; “Kodi Mwini chisoni chosatha ndani? Kodi iwe ufuna kuti ife tizipembedza chilichonse chimene iwe utilamula?” Mawu amenewa amaonjezera kukana kwawo
25_61: Alemekezeke Iye amene adalenga gulu la nyenyezi kumtambo ndipo adalenga dzuwa ndi mwezi wowala
25_62: Ndipo ndiye amene amasinthanitsa usiku ndi usana chifukwa cha iye amene afuna kukumbukira kapena afuna kuonetsa kuyamika kwake
25_63: Ndipo akapolo a Mwini Chisoni Chosatha ndi iwo amene amayenda modzichepetsa padziko lapansi ndipo ngati mbuli zikawayankhula mwachipongwe iwo amayankha mwaulemu
25_64: Ndipo iwo amene amachezera pamaso pa Ambuye wawo, amagwada ndi kuima
25_65: Amene amanena kuti, “Ambuye wathu! Tichotsereni chilango cha ku Gahena.” Ndithudi chilango chake ndi chosatha
25_66: Ndithudi kumeneko ndi malo wonyansa kupumirako ndiponso malo wonyansa kukhalako
25_67: Iwo akamapereka saononga chuma chawo moposa muyeso ndipo saumira koma amakhala pakatikati
25_68: Ndipo anthu amene sapembedza mulungu wina kuonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni ndipo sakupha mzimu umene Mulungu waletsa kupatula mu njira yachilungamo ndipo sachita chigololo. Ndipo aliyense amene achita izi adzalandira chilango
25_69: Chilango chake chidzaonjezedwa kawiri patsiku la kuuka kwa akufa ndipo adzakhala ndi manyazi nthawi zonse
25_70: Kupatula okhawo amene alapa ndi kukhulupirira ndi kuchita ntchito zabwino, chifukwa potero Mulungu adzasintha zoipa zawo kukhala ntchito zabwino. Ndipo Mulungu amakhululukira ndi wachisoni chosatha
25_71: Iye amene alapa ndi kuchita ntchito zabwino, ndithudi, ndiye kuti wabwerera kwa Mulungu
25_72: Iwo amene sapereka umboni ku zinthu zabodza ndipo akamadutsa pamalo pamene pakuchitika zinthu zoipa kapena zoletsedwa, iwo amadutsa modzilemekeza
25_73: Amene sanyozera chivumbulutso cha Ambuye wawo ndipo pamene akumbutsidwa za icho sachita ngati kuti iwo ndi a gonthi kapena a khungu
25_74: Ndipo anthu amene amanena kuti, “Ambuye wathu! Tipatseni chisangalalo mu akazi ndi ana athu ndipo tipangeni ife kukhala atsogoleri a iwo amene amakuopani Inu!”
25_75: Amenewa adzalipidwa Paradiso wa pamwamba chifukwa cha kupirira kwawo. Kumeneko adzalandiridwa ndi malonje abwino mawu amtendere ndi aulemu
25_76: Adzakhala kumeneko nthawi zonse ndipo ndi malo abwino kukhalako ndiponso ndi malo abwino opumirako
25_77: Nena “Ambuye wanga amakusamalani inu chifukwa cha mapempheroanuakwa Iyeyekha. Komatsopano, ndithudi, inu mwamukana Iye. Motero chilango chidzakhala chanu mpaka kalekale.”
26_2: Awa ndi mawu omveka a Buku la Korani
26_3: Iwe mwina ukhoza kudziononga ndi madandaulo chifukwa cha kusakhulupirira kwawo
26_4: Ngati Ife tifuna, tikhoza kuwavumbulutsira chizindikiro chochokera kumwamba chimene makosi awo adzakhota modzichepetsa
26_5: Palibe chenjezo latsopano limene limadza kuchokera kwa Mwini chisoni chosatha koma iwo amalikana
26_6: Ndithudi iwo amakana mawu a Mulungu koma nkhani zidzadza kwa iwo zokhudza zinthu zimene iwo amazichita chipongwe
26_7: Kodi iwo saona nthaka, mmene ife tameretsamo mbewu zabwino zosiyanasiyana
26_8: Ndithudi m’menemu muli chizindikiro komabe ambiri a iwo sakhulupirira ayi
26_9: Ndithudi Ambuye wako ndiye Mwini mphamvu zonse ndiponso Mwini chisoni chosatha
26_10: Ndipo pamene Ambuye wako adamuitana Mose adanena kuti, “Pita kwa anthu opanda chilungamo.”
26_12: Iye adati, “Ambuye wanga! Ndithudi ine ndili kuopa kuti adzandikana.”
26_14: “Ndipo iwo ali ndi mangawa ndi ine ndipo ndichita mantha kuti akhoza kukandipha.”
26_15: Mulungu adati, “Nkosatheka kutero! Kotero pitani nonse awiri ndi zizindikiro zathu. Ife tidzakhala ndi inu ndipo tidzamva.”
26_16: Ndipo mukakafika kwa Farawo mukamuuze kuti, “Ife ndife Atumwi ochokera kwa Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse.”
26_17: “Motero alekeni ana a Israyeli kuti apite ndi ife.”
26_18: (Farawo) adati, “Kodi ife sitidakurere iwe pamene udali wamng’ono? Ndipo iwe unakhala pakati pathu zaka zambiri.”
26_19: “Ndipo iwe udachita chimene udachita. Ndithudi iwe ndiwe mmodzi wa anthu osathokoza.”
26_20: (Mose) adati, “Ine ndidachita chimenecho popeza nthawi imeneyo ndidali wosadziwa china chilichonse.”
26_21: “Motero ine ndidathawa inu nonse pa nthawi imene ndidakuopani koma tsopano Ambuye wanga wandipatsa luntha ndiponso wandipanga ine kukhala mmodzi mwa Atumwi ake.”
26_22: “Ndipo uwu ndi mwayi umene ubwino wake iwe uli kundinyogodola. Iwe wasandutsa ana a Israyeli kukhala akapolo ako.”
26_23: Farawo adati, “Kodi Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse ndani?”
26_24: (Mose) adati, “Ambuye wa kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi ndi zonse zimene zili pakati pawo ngati inu mufuna kukhulupirira.”
26_25: (Farawo) adawafunsa anthu amene adamuzungulira! “Kodi muli kumva zimene ali kunenazi.”
26_26: (Mose) adapitiriza kuti, “Ambuye wanu ndiponso Ambuye wa makolo anu akale.”
26_27: (Farawo) adati, “Ndithudi Mtumwi amene watumizidwa kwa inu ndi wopenga.”
26_28: (Mose) adati, “Iye ndi Ambuye wa kum’mawa ndi kumadzulo ndi zonse zimene zikhala kumeneko ngati muli ozindikira.”
26_29: (Farawo) adayankha kuti, “Ngati iwe utumikira mulungu wina kupatula ine, ndithudi ndikupanga kukhala mmodzi wa anthu okhala ku ndende.”
26_30: (Mose) adafunsa kuti, “Kodi zingakhale choncho ngakhale nditakulangiza chizindikiro choonekeratu? “
26_31: (Farawo) adati, “Tilangize chizindikiro chako ngati zonse zimene unena ndi zoona.”
26_32: Motero Mose adaponya ndodo yake pansi ndipo nthawi yomweyo idasanduka njoka yeniyeni
26_33: Ndipo Iye adatulutsa dzanja lake ndipo nthawi yomweyo lidasanduka loyera kwa iwo amene adaliona
26_34: Farawo adauza nduna zake kuti, “Ndithudi munthu uyu ndi wodziwa matsenga.”
26_35: “Iyeyu afuna kukuchotsani m’dziko lanu ndi matsenga ake. Kodi ulangizi wanu ndi wotani ndipo ukupereka langizo lanji?”
26_36: Iwo adati, “Muyambe mwawasunga iye pamodzi ndi m’bale wake kwa kanthawi kochepa. Tumizani mithenga ku mizinda yanu
26_37: Abweretse kwa inu munthu aliyense yemwe ndi wodziwa matsenga kwambiri.”
26_38: Motero anthu amatsengawa adasonkhanitsidwa patsiku lodziwika lomwe adagwirizana
26_39: Ndipo anthu adafunsidwa kuti, “Kodi nonse mudzasonkhana?”
26_40: “Kuti mwina ife tikhoza kudzatsatira a matsenga ngati iwo atapambana.”
26_41: Ndipo pamene anthu onse amatsenga adadza kwa Farawo, iwo adati kwa Farawo, “Kodi mudzatilipira ngati titapambana?”
26_42: Iye adati, “Inde. Ndipo ndithudi inu mudzakhala kufupi ndi Ine.”
26_43: Mose adawauza kuti, “Ponyani pansi chilichonse chimene mufuna kuponya.”
26_44: Ndipo iwo adaponya zingwe ndi ndodo zawo ndipo adati: “Mwa mphamvu ya Farawo, ndithudi, ife tipambana.”
26_45: Ndipo Mose adaponya ndodo yake ndipo nthawi yomweyo idameza zonse zabodza zimene iwo adapanga
26_46: Ndipo anthu amatsenga onse aja adagwa pansi mogwada
26_47: Iwo adati, “Ife takhulupirira mwa Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse.”
26_49: Farawo adati, “Kodi inu mwakhulupirira mwa iye pamene ine sindinakupatseni chilolezo? Ndithudi iye ndi mtsogoleri wanu amene adakuphunzitsani matsenga. Ndithudi posachedwapa mudzazindikira. Ndithudi ine ndidzadula manja anu ndi miyendo yanu moisiyanitsa. Ndidzakudulani dzanja lamanja ndi mwendo wamanzere ndiponso ndidzakupachikani pa mtanda.”
26_50: Iwo adati, “Zilibe kanthu chifukwa ndithudi ife tidzabwerera kwa Ambuye wathu.”
26_51: “Ndithudi Ife tili ndi chiyembekezo kuti Ambuye wathu adzatikhululukira machimo athu popeza ndife oyamba kukhulupirira.”
26_52: Ndipo tidamulamula Mose kuti, “Nyamuka nthawi ya usiku ndi akapolo anga chifukwa, ndithudi, inu mulondoledwa ndi gulu la adani anu.”
26_53: Ndipo Farawo adatumiza mithenga ku mizinda yonse
26_54: “Ndithudi anthu amenewa ndi kagulu ka anthu ochepa.”
26_57: Ndipo tidawachotsa m’minda ndi mu a kasupe
26_58: Ndiponso m’chuma ndi m’malo alionse olemekezeka
26_59: Kotero tidawapanga ana a Israyeli kukhala alowa m’malo a zinthu za anthu a Farawo
26_60: Pamene dzuwa linali kutuluka, iwo adalondoledwa ndi adani awo
26_61: Ndipo pamene magulu awiriwa adaonana wina ndi mnzake, anthu a Mose adati, “Ndithudi atipeza.”
26_62: Mose adati, “Iyayi. Ndithudi Ambuye wanga ali ndi ine ndipo adzanditsogolera.”
26_63: Ndipo tidalamulira Mose kuti, “Menya madzi a m’nyanja ndi ndodo yako.” Ndipo nyanja idagawanika pakati, mbali iliyonse idali ngati phiri lalikulu
26_64: Ndipo anthu a Farawo tidawayandikitsa ndi nyanja ija
26_65: Ndipo Ife tidapulumutsa Mose ndi onse amene adali ndi iye
26_67: Ndithudi mu ichi muli phunziro komabe anthu ambiri sakhulupirira ayi
26_68: Ndithudi Ambuye wako! Iye ndiye Mwini mphamvu zonse ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha
26_70: Pamenepo iye adanena kwa abambo ake ndiponso kwa anthu ake kuti, “Kodi ndi chiyani chimene inu muli kupembedza?”
26_71: Iwo adati, “Timatumikira mafano ndipo timapempha kwa iwo modzipereka kwambiri.”
26_72: Ndipo adati, “Kodi iwo amakumvani pamene mumawapempha?”
26_74: Iwo adati, “Iyayi. Koma ife tidawapeza makolo athu akupembedza mafano.”
26_75: Iye adati, “Kodi inu muli kuzidziwa zimene muli kuzipembedza?”
26_77: “Ndithudi onse ndi adani anga kupatula Ambuye wachilengedwe.”
26_78: “Amene adandipanga ine ndipo ndiye amene amandipatsa chilangizo.”
26_79: “Ndipo ndiye amene amandipatsa chakudya ndi chakumwa.”
26_81: “Ndipo ndiye amene adzandipangitsa kuti ndife ndi kudzandibwezeranso moyo.”
26_82: “Ndi amene ine ndimayembekezera kuti adzandikhululukira machimo anga pa tsiku lachiweruzo”
26_83: Ambuye ndipatseni luntha ndipo mundilole kuti ndikhale pakati pa anthu ochita zabwino
26_84: Ndipatseni ulemerero umene udzatchulidwe ndi mibadwo yomwe ikubwera mtsogolo
26_85: Ndipo ndiikeni m’gulu la anthu amene adzakhala kumalo a mtendere a ku Paradiso
26_86: Akhululukireni abambo anga ndithudi iwo ali mmodzi mwa anthu osochera
26_87: Musadzandichititse manyazi patsiku limene anthu adzaukitsidwa kwa akufa
26_88: Tsiku limene chuma ndi ana sizidzathandiza wina aliyense
26_89: Kupatula yekhayo amene adzadza kwa Mulungu ndi mtima woyera
26_90: Pamenepo Paradiso idzayandikiritsidwa kwa anthu angwiro
26_91: Ndipo Gahena idzaonetsedwa poyera kwa anthu ochimwa
26_92: Mawu adzanenedwa kwa iwo kuti, “Kodi mafano anu aja amene mumatumikira ali kuti?”
26_93: Kuwonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni? Kodi iwo akhoza kukuthandizani inu kapena kudzithandiza okha?”
26_94: Ndipo iwo ndi onse ochimwa adzaponyedwa ku Gahena
26_95: Ndiponso pamodzi ndi magulu onse a Satana
26_96: Iwo adzati pamene adzakhala ali kukangana kumeneko
26_97: “Pali Mulungu, ndithudi, ife tidali ochimwa moonekeratu.”
26_98: Pamene tidakusandutsani inu kukhala ofanana ndi Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse
26_99: Palibe ena koma anthu ochita zoipa amene adatisocheretsa ife
26_102: Koma tikadakhalanso ndi moyo, tikadakhala anthu okhulupirira
26_103: Ndithudi mu zimenezi muli chizindikiro koma anthu ambiri sakhulupirira ayi
26_104: Ndithudi Ambuye wanu! Ndiye Mwini mphamvu zonse ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha
26_105: Anthu a m’badwo wa Nowa adakana Atumwi awo
26_106: Pamene Nowa adati, “Kodi inu simungaope Mulungu ndi kumumvera Iye?”
26_109: “Ine sindikupemphani malipiro ena alionse chifukwa palibe wina aliyense amene angandilipire ine kupatula Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse.”
26_111: Iwo adati, “Kodi ife tikukhulupirire iwe pamene anthu onyozeka ndiwo amene amakutsatira iwe?”
26_112: Nowa adati, “Kodi ine ndikudziwa chiyani za chimene iwo amachita?”
26_113: “Ambuye wanga ndiye amene akhoza kuweruza ngati mumazindikira.”
26_116: Iwo adati, “Iwe Nowa; ngati siusiya zimene uchita udzaponyedwa miyala.”
26_117: Iye adati, “Ambuye wanga! Ndithudi anthu anga akundikana.”
26_118: Motero weruzani mwachilungamo pakati pa ine ndi iwo. Ndipulumutseni ine pamodzi ndi anthu okhulupirira amene ali ndi ine
26_119: Ife tidamupulumutsa iye pamodzi ndi iwo amene adali naye m’chombo
26_120: Ndipo pambuyo pake tidamiza ena onse ndi chigumula
26_121: Ndithudi mu chimenechi muli phunziro komabe ambiri sakhulupirira
26_122: Ndithudi Ambuye wako ndi Mwini mphamvu ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha
26_123: Anthu a ku Aad sanakhulupirire Atumwi awo
26_124: Pamene m’bale wawo Houd adati, “Kodi inu simungakhale ndi mantha ndi Mulungu?”
26_127: “Pa ntchito iyi, ine sindipempha malipiro kuchokera kwa inu chifukwa palibe wina amene angandilipire kupatula Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse.”
26_128: “Kodi inu mukumamanga nyumba pamalo paliponse pokwera mofuna kudzisangalatsa?”
26_129: “Kodi muli kumanga nyumba zokongola ndi zolimba ngati kuti mudzakhalamo mpaka kalekale?”
26_130: “Ndipo pamene mumenya anthu mumamenya ngati anthu ankhanza.”
26_132: “Ndipo muopeni Iye amene wakupatsani inu zinthu zonse zimene mumazidziwa.”
26_135: “Ndithudi ine ndili kuchita mantha ndi chilango chimene chidzadza pa inu pa tsiku loopsa.”
26_136: Iwo adati, “Ndi chimodzimodzi kwa ife kaya utilalikira kapena ayi.”
26_137: “Zonse zimene uli kutiopseza nazo ndi chikhalidwe cha anthu amakedzana.”
26_139: Iwo adamukana iye ndipo Ife tidawaononga onse. Ndithudi mu chimenechi muli phunziro koma ambiri sakhulupirira ayi
26_140: Ndithudi Ambuye wako ndiye Mwini mphamvu zonse ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha
26_141: Anthu a Thamoud adakana Atumwi awo
26_142: Pamene m’bale wawo Saleh adati, “Kodi inu simungakhale ndi mantha ndi Mulungu?”
26_145: “Pa ntchito iyi ine sindili kukupemphani malipiro. Palibe wina amene angandilipire kupatula Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse.”
26_146: “Kodi inu muganiza kuti mudzasiyidwa mu mtendere wa m’dziko lino?”
26_148: “Minda ya chimanga ndi mitengo ya tende imene yapatsa zipatso zambiri.”
26_149: “Ndipo muboola mapiri ndi kumangamo nyumba zanu mwaukatswiri;”
26_150: “Khalani ndi mantha ndi Mulungu ndipo mundimvere ine.”
26_152: “Amene amachita zoipa padziko lapansi ndipo sakonza makhalidwe awo.”
26_153: Iwo adati, “Iwe uli mmodzi mwa olodzedwa.”
26_154: “Iwe ndiwe munthu wonga ife tomwe. Tilangize chizindikiro ngati zimene ukunenazi ndi zoona”
26_155: Iye adati, “Iyi ndi ngamira yaikazi. Iyo idzamwa madzi patsiku lake ndipo inu mudzamwa patsiku lanu lokhazikitsidwa.”
26_156: “Musaizunze ayi chifukwa mukatero chilango cha tsiku loopsa chidzadza kwa inu.”
26_157: Komabe iwo adaipha iyo ndipo adanong’oneza bombono
26_158: Chilango chidawapeza iwo. Ndithudi mu chimenechi muli chizindikiro koma ambiri a iwo sakhulupirira
26_159: Ndithudi Ambuye wako! Indedi ndiye Mwini mphamvu zonse ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha
26_160: Anthu a Loti adakana Atumwi awo
26_161: Pamene m’bale wawo Loti adati, “Kodi inu simungaope Mulungu?”
26_164: “Ine sindili kupempha kuti mundilipire chifukwa cha ichi ayi chifukwa palibe wina amene angandilipire kupatula Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse.”
26_165: “Kodi inu mwasankha kuti muzigonana ndi amuna anzanu mwa zolengedwa zonse
26_166: “Kusiya akazi amene Mulungu adakulengerani? Koma inu ndinu anthu olakwa kwambiri.”
26_167: Iwo adati, “Iwe Loti! Ngati siusiya zimenezi ndithudi udzakhala mmodzi mwa othamangitsidwa.”
26_168: Iye adati, “Ine ndili kudana ndi makhalidwe anu.”
26_169: “Ambuye wanga! Ndipulumutseni ine pamodzi ndi a pabanja langa ku ntchito zawo zoipa.”
26_170: Ndipo Ife tidamupulumutsa iye pamodzi ndi anthu ake onse
26_171: Kupatula mayi wokalamba, pakati pa amene adatsalira m’mbuyo
26_172: Ndipo Ife tidawaononga kwambiri ena onse
26_173: Ndipo choipa chidali chilango cha mvula imene idagwa pa iwo amene adachenjezedwa koma sadamvere
26_174: Ndithudi mu ichi muli phunziro koma ambiri a iwo sakhulupirira
26_175: Ndithudi Ambuye wako ndiye mwini mphamvu zonse ndi mwini chisoni chosatha
26_176: Nawonso anthu okhala m’nkhalango adakana Atumwi
26_177: Pamene Shaibu adawauza kuti, “Kodi inu simungaope Mulungu?”
26_180: “Ine sindikupemphani malipiro chifukwa palibe wina aliyense amene angandilipire kupatula Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse.”
26_183: “Ndipo musawachepetsere anthu zinthu zawo kapena kulowetsa chisokonezo m’dziko.”
26_184: “Muopeni Iye amene adakulengani inu ndi mibadwo yakale.”
26_186: “Iwe ndiwe munthu wolingana ndi ife. Ndithudi ife tili kuganiza kuti iwe uli kunama.”
26_187: “Tigwetsere mtambo kuchokera kumwamba ngati zimene uli kunena ndi zoonadi.”
26_188: Iye adati, “Ambuye wanga amadziwa kwambiri chimene inu mumachita.”
26_189: Iwo adamukana iye kotero chilango cha thambo ndi moto chidawaononga. Ichi chidali chilango cha tsiku loopsa
26_190: Ndithudi mu chimenechi muli chiphunzitso koma ambiri a iwo sakhulupirira
26_191: Ndithudi Ambuye wako ndiye Mwini mphamvu zonse ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha
26_192: Buku lolemekezekali lavumbulutsidwa ndi Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse
26_194: Ku mtima wako kuti ukhoza kuchenjeza mitundu ya anthu
26_196: Ndithudi lili kupezeka mu mawu a Mulungu akale
26_197: Kodi si chizindikiro kwa iwo kuti anthu ophunzira a ana a Israyeli amalidziwa
26_198: Ngati Ife tikadaivumbulutsa kwa munthu wa mtundu wina uliwonse yemwesi wa Chiarabu
26_199: Kuti iye ailakatule kwa iwo ndipo sakadakhulupirira iwo mwa Bukulo
26_200: Kotero Ife tidaipanga iyo kuti ilowe m’mitima ya anthu ochitazoipa
26_202: Ndipo icho chidzadza kwa iwo mwadzidzidzi pamene iwo sakudziwa
26_203: Ndipo iwo adzati, “Kodi ife sitidzapatsidwanso nthawi?”
26_204: Kodi iwo angafune kuti chilango chathu chidze msanga
26_205: Tandiuza. Ngati Ife titawalola kukhala mu mtendere wa zaka zambiri
26_206: Ndipo pambuyo pake chilango chimene chidalonjezedwa chidza pa iwo
26_207: Chisangalalo chawo chimene adapatsidwa chidzakhala chopanda phindu
26_208: Palibe mtundu wa anthu umene tidaonongapo kale umene sitidautumizire owachenjeza
26_209: Monga chenjezo ndipo Ife si ndife opondereza ayi
26_210: Si a Satana amene adabweretsa Korani ino ayi
26_211: Si koyenera kwa iwo ndiponso sangathe kutero
26_212: Ndithudi iwo amanidwa kumva za Bukuli
26_213: Musapembedze milungu ina kuonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni chifukwa mukatero mudzakhala m’gulu limene lidzalangidwa
26_214: Achenjeze abale ako amene ali pafupi ndi iwe
26_215: Ndipo onetsa chifundo kwa anthu okhulupirira amene amakutsatira iwe
26_216: Ngati iwo sakumvera iwe, unene kuti, “Ine sindidzaimbidwa mlandu chifukwa cha zimene mumachita.”
26_217: Ika chikhulupiriro chako mwa Mwini mphamvu zonse ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha
26_219: Ndi machitidwe ako pakati pa anthu opemphera
26_220: Mulungu amamva chilichonse ndipo amadziwa china chilichonse
26_221: Kodi ndi kuuzeni za munthu amene Satana amamutsikira
26_222: Iwo amadza pa munthu wabodza ndi wochimwa
26_223: Iwo amamvera mabodza okhaokha ndipo komaambiriaiwondiabodza
26_225: Kodi simuona kuti iwo amangonena nkhani iliyonse mu zolakatula zawo
26_226: Ndipo iwo amakamba zinthu zimene iwo sachita
26_227: Kupatula okhawo amene akhulupirira ndipo amachita ntchito zabwino ndi kumakumbukira Mulungu kwambiri ndi kudziteteza pambuyo pa kuponderezedwa. Ndipo iwo amene amachita zoipa adzadziwa chimene chidzawagadabuza
27_1: Ichi ndi chivumbulutso cha Korani, Buku lofotokoza bwino
27_2: Malangizo ndi nkhani yosangalatsa kwa anthu okhulupirira
27_3: Amene amapitiriza kupemphera ndipo amapereka msonkho wothandiza anthu osauka ndiponso amakhulupirira kwambiri m’moyo umene uli nkudza
27_4: Ndithudi iwo ndi amene amakana za moyo umene uli nkudza. Ife tazipanga ntchito zawo kuti zioneke ngati zabwino motero iwo amayenda mwakhungu
27_5: Iwo adzalangidwa koposa. Ndipo m’moyo umene uli nkudza, iwo sadzapindula china chilichonse
27_6: Ndithudi iwe walandira Korani kuchokera kwa Iye amene ali ndi nzeru ndipo amadziwa chilichonse
27_7: Pamenepo Mose adauza banja lake kuti, “Ine ndili kuona moto. Ine posachedwapa ndikubweretserani nkhani kapena khala la moto kuti mukhoza kuotha.”
27_8: Ndipo pamene iye adafika pamoto paja, mawu adamveka akunena naye kuti, “odalitsidwa ndiye amene ali mu moto uwu ndiponso alionse a pamalo pozungulira. Ulemerero ukhale kwa Mulungu, Ambuye wa zolengedwe zonse.”
27_9: “Mose! Ine ndine Mulungu, Mwini mphamvu zonse ndi Mwini nzeru zonse.”
27_10: “Ponya ndodo yako pansi.” Ndipo pamene iye adaona kuti ilikuyenda ngati njoka, adatembenuka ndi kuthawa ndipo sadayang’ane m’mbuyo. “Iwe Mose!” Atumwi anga sachita mantha pamene ali ndi Ine
27_11: Akakhala iwo amene amalakwa ndipo amachita zabwino pambuyo pochita zoipa Ine ndine wokhululukira ndiponso wachisoni chosatha
27_12: “Pisa dzanja m’thumba mwako. Litulutse lili loyera ngakhale kuti siudapweteke. Ichi ndi chimodzi cha zizindikiro zisanu ndi zinayi zimene zidzaonetsedwa kwa Farawo ndi anthu ake. Ndithudi iwo ndi anthu ochimwa kwambiri.”
27_13: Pamene zizindikiro zathu zooneka bwino zinaonetsedwa kwa iwo, iwo adati, “Uwu ndiwo ufiti weniweni.”
27_14: Mitima yawo idadziwa kuti zizindikiro zidali zoona koma adazikana izo chifukwa chakulakwa ndiponso kunyada kwawo. Taona zimene zidawaonekera anthu olakwa
27_15: Ndithudi Ife tidapereka nzeru kwa Davide ndi Solomoni. Iwo adati, “Kuyamikidwa ndi kwa Iye amene watikweza ife kukhala pamwamba pa akapolo ake ambiri okhulupirira.”
27_16: Solomoniadalowam’malomwaDavide.Iye adati, “Oh inu anthu anga! Ife taphunzitsidwa chiyankhulo cha mbalame ndipo tapatsidwa zinthu zabwino zambiri. Ndithudi ichi ndi chifundo choonekeratu.”
27_17: Asirikali a nkhondo a mtundu wa majini, anthu ena ndi mbalame anasonkhanitsidwa pamaso pa Solomoni ndipo adaimitsidwa pa mizere m’magulu osiyanasiyana mogwirizana ndi maudindo
27_18: Mpaka pamene iwo anafika pa chigwa cha nyerere, nyerere ina idati, “Oh inu nyerere! Lowani ku maenje anu chifukwa mwina Solomoni pamodzi ndi Asirikali ake, akhoza kukuonongani mosadziwa.”
27_19: Solomoni adamwetulira posangalatsidwa ndi mawu ake ndipo iye adati, “Ndilangizeni Ambuye kuti ndizikuthokozani pa zabwino zonse zimene mwandipatsa ine ndi makolo anga ndiponso kuti ndizichita ntchito zabwino zimene zimakukondweretsani inu. Ndilowetseni ine ku Paradiso kudzera m’chisomo chanu, kuti ndikhale pakati pa akapolo anu angwiro.”
27_20: Iye adayendera mbalame nati, “Kodi mbalame yotchedwa mnthengu ili kuti? Kodi kapena iyo ili pamodzi ndi amene sadabwere?”
27_21: “Ndithudi ndidzailanga iyo ndi chilango chowawa kapena ndidzaipha kupatula ngati ibweretsa kwa ine chifukwa chomveka.”
27_22: Ndipo mbalame ya mnthengu siidachedwe ndipo idati, “Ndadziwa zimene iwe siudziwa ndipo ndikubweretsera nkhani yoona kuchokera ku Saba.”
27_23: “Ine ndapeza munthu wamkazi akulamulira iwo ndipo iye wapatsidwa zinthu zonse zomuyenereza ndipo ali ndi Mpando waukulu wachifumu
27_24: Ndidamupeza iye pamodzi ndi anthu ake ali kupembedza dzuwa moonjezera pa Mulungu ndipo Satana wawakongoletsera ntchito zawo zoipa ndipo wawasocheretsakunjirayoyenerandipoiwosiotsogozedwa bwino.”
27_25: Ndi kuti sapembedza Mulungu amene amaulula zobisika za kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi ndipo Iye amadziwa zimene inu mumabisa ndi zimene mumaulula
27_26: Mulungu! Kulibe mulungu wina koma Iye yekha. Ambuye wa mpando wa Chifumu
27_27: Solomoni adati, “Tidzaona posachedwapa ngati zimene ukunena ndi zoona kapena zabodza.”
27_28: “Pita ukapereke kalata yangayi kwa iwo ndipo ukachoke pang’ono poyembekezera yankho lawo.”
27_29: Mfumukazi ya ku Saba adati, “Oh inu nduna zanga! Ine ndalandira kalata yolemekezeka.”
27_30: Kalatayi ndi yochokera kwa Solomoni ndipo ikuti, “M’dzina la Mulungu, Mwini chifundo ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha.”
27_31: “Usadzikweze kwa ine koma bwerani nonse kwa ine modzipereka.”
27_32: Iye adati, “oh inu mafumu! Ndipatseni chilangizo chokhudza nkhani iyi ndipo sindilamula china chilichonse pokhapokha inu mutakhalapo.”
27_33: Iwo adati, “Ife ndife olimba mtima ndiponso odziwa kumenya nkhondo molimba, ndipo nkhani ili kwa iwe. Ndipo udziwe mmene ungalamulire.”
27_34: Iye adati, “Ndithudi mafumu akalowa mu mzinda amaononga mwaupandu ndi kuwasandutsa anthu olemekezeka kukhala onyozeka. Umo ndi mmene iwo amachitira.”
27_35: “Koma ine ndiwatumizira mphatso ndipo ndidzaona yankho limene a Kazembe anga adzabwere nalo.”
27_36: Ndipo pamene akazembe adadza kwa Solomoni, iye adati, “Kodi muli kundipatsa chuma chambiri? Icho chimene Mulungu wandipatsa ine ndi chabwino kuposa chuma chonse chimene wakupatsani inu. Koma inu mumasangalala ndi mphatso zanu.”
27_37: “Bwererani kwa iwo. Ife tidzapita kwa iwo ndi magulu ankhondo amene iwo sangathe kuwagonjetsa ndipo tidzawathamangitsa m’dziko lawo mochititsa manyazi ndipo iwo adzanyozeka.”
27_38: Iye adati, “oh inu mafumu! Kodi ndani amene angandibweretsere mpando wake wachifumu iwo asanabwerekwainemogonja?”
27_39: Winawamphamvu, amene adalimmodziwamajiniadati,“Inendidzakubweretseraniinu musadanyamuke pa mpando wanu. Ine ndili ndi mphamvu zonyamulira mpando ndiponso ndine wokhulupirika.”
27_40: Koma wina amene anali kudziwa Mawu a Mulungu adati “Ine ndidzakubweretserani msanga musadaphenire maso anu.” Ndipo pamene iye adaona kuti mpando wabwera kwa iye adati, “Ichi ndi chisomo cha Ambuye wanga kuti andiyese ngati ndikuthokoza kapena sindikuthokoza. Ndipo aliyense amene athokoza atero podzipezera yekha zabwino. Ndipo amene sathokoza ndithu, Ambuye wanga ali ndi zonse ndipo ndi Wolemekezeka.”
27_41: Ndipo iye adati, “Sinthani mpando wake wachifumu kuti tione ngati iye akhoza kuuzindikira kapena ayi.”
27_42: Ndipo pamene mfumukazi inadza kwa Solomoni idafunsidwa kuti, “Kodi mpando wako wachifumu ndi otere?” Iye adati, “Ukukhala ngati umenewu” ndipo ife tinadziwa kale ndipo tagonja kwa Mulungu mwamtendere.”
27_43: Zinthu zimene amapembedza zoonjezera pa Mulungu ndi zimene zamusokoneza. Iye adali mmodzi wa anthu osakhulupirira
27_44: Iye adauzidwa kuti, “Lowa mnyumba yachifumu.” Ndipo pamene iye anaiona iyo, adaganiza kuti ndi dziwe la madzi ndipo miyendo yake adaionetsa poyera. Solomoni adati, “Iyi ndi nyumba yachifumu yomatidwa ndi magalasi.” Iye adati, “Ambuye, ine ndalakwira mzimu wanga. Tsopano ndili kudzipereka pamodzi ndi Solomoni kwa Mulungu, Ambuye wazolengedwa zonse.”
27_45: A Thamoud, ndithudi, tidawatumizira m’bale wawo Saleh, amene adati, “Muzipembedza Mulungu basi.” Koma iwo adagawikana m’magulu awiri okangana
27_46: Iye adati, “Anthu anga! Kodi bwanji mufuna kubweretsa choipa msanga musanabweretse chabwino? Nanga ndi chifukwa chiyani simupempha chikhululukiro kwa Mulungu kuti mukhoza kupeza chisomo chake?”
27_47: Iwo adati, “Ife tili kuona choipa chochokera kwa iwe ndiponso kwa anthu amene amakutsatira iwe.” Iye adati, “Choipa chimene muli kuchiona chili kuchokera kwa Mulungu. Inu ndinu anthu amene muli kuyesedwa.”
27_48: M’mizinda mwawo mudali anthu asanu ndi anayi amene anali kuchita zoipa mdziko ndipo samachita zabwino ayi
27_49: Iwo adati, “Tiyeni tonse tilumbire, dzina la Mulungu, kuti timuphe nthawi ya usiku pamodzi ndi a pabanja lake lonse. Ndipo tidzawauza abale ake kuti, “Ife kudalibe pamene iwo anali kuphedwa. Ndipo zimene tili kunena ndi zoona zokhazokha.”
27_50: Iwo adachita chiwembu ndipo nafenso tidachita chiwembu iwo osadziwa chilichonse
27_51: Ndipo taona zotsatira zake za chiwembu chawo. Ife tidawaonongeratu pamodzi ndi anthu awo onse
27_52: Chifukwa chakuti iwo adalakwa, nyumba zawo zimene anali kukhalamo tsopano ndi mabwinja. Ndithudi m’zimenezi muli zizindikiro kwa anthu ozindikira
27_53: Ndipo Ife tidapulumutsa anthu onse okhulupirira ndipo anali kuopa Mulungu
27_54: Loti kwa anthu ake, “Kodi inu mukuchita zinthu zochititsa manyazi pamene muli kuona?”
27_55: “Kodi inu muli kuchita chiwerewere ndi amuna anzanu pokwaniritsa zilakolako zanu ndi kusiya akazi? Inu ndinu mbuli basi.”
27_56: “Yankho lawo silidali lina koma kuti, “Chotsani anthu a Loti mu mzinda wanu. Awa ndi anthu amene afuna kudziyeretsa.”
27_57: Ife tidamupulumutsa iye pamodzi ndi anthu ake kupatula mkazi wake amene adatsalira m’chilango
27_58: Ndipo tidawalasa iwo ndi mvula ya miyala imene idagwa pa iwo. Ndi mvula yoipa imene idagwera iwo amene adachenjezedwa
27_59: Nena, “Kuyamikidwa kukhale kwa Mulungu ndipo mtendere ukhale pa Atumwi ake amene Iye wawasankha. Kodi wabwino ndani Mulungu kapena mafano amene amawapembedza yoonjezera pa Mulungu?”
27_60: Kapena wabwino ndi Iye amene adalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi ndi kukutumizirani mvula kuchokera kumwamba ndi kubweretsa minda ya chisangalalo? Iwo sangathe kumeretsa mitengo. Kodi pali milungu ina yoonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni? Koma iwo ndi anthu amene amafanizira ena ake kukhala ofanana ndi Mulungu
27_61: Kapena Iye amene adakhazikitsa dziko ndi kulithirira ilo ndi mitsinje ya madzi oyenda; ndipo wakhazikitsa mapiri pa dziko ndipo waika malire pakati pa nyanja ziwiri. Kodi pali mulungu wina woonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni? Koma ambiri a iwo ndi osadziwa
27_62: Kapena Iye amene amayankha mapemphero a munthu opanikizika pamene amupempha Iye ndipo amamuchotsera mavuto. Ndiyetu amene wakupatsani dziko lapansi kuti muzikhalamo. Kodi pali mulungu winanso woonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni? Ndi zazing’ono zimene mumakumbukira
27_63: Kapena ndi Iye amene amakutsogolerani mu mdima pa mtunda kapena pa nyanja ndipo amatumiza mphepo ngati yonyamula uthenga wabwino wa chisomo chake. Kodi pali mulungu winanso woonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni? Mulungu ndi wapamwamba kuposa zimene amamufanizira nazo
27_64: Kapena Iye amene poyambirira adapanga zolengedwa ndiponso amene adzatidzutsanso kukhala ndi moyo m’moyo umene uli nkudza ndiponso amene amakupatsani chakudya kuchokera ku nthaka ndi kumwamba? Kodi pali mulungu winanso woonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni? Nena, “Tionetseni chizindikiro chanu ngati zimene mukunenazi ndi zoonadi.”
27_65: Nena, “Palibe amene ali kumwamba kapena pa dziko lapansi amene amadziwa zobisika kupatula Mulungu. Ndiponso anthu sadziwa nthawi imene adzaukitsidwa kukhalanso ndi moyo.”
27_66: Kodi kuzindikira kwawo m’moyo umene uli nkudza kwakwaniritsidwa? Iwo ndi okaika pa zamoyo umene uli nkudza ndipo maso awo ndi otsekeka pa za iwo
27_67: Anthu osakhulupirira adati, “Kodi pamene ife ndi makolo anthu, tisanduka dothi tidzaukitsidwanso?”
27_68: “Ndithudi ife tidalonjezedwa ndiponso makolo athu. Ichi si china ayi koma nkhani zopanda pake za anthu akale.”
27_69: Nena, “Pitani pa dziko lonse lapansi ndipo mukaone zimene zidawaonekera anthu ochimwa.”
27_70: Usachite chisoni kapena kuvutika mu mtima chifukwa cha ziwembu zimene apanga
27_71: Ndipo iwo amati, “Kodi lonjezo limeneli lidzakwaniritsidwa liti ngati zimene muli kunenazi ndi zoona?”
27_72: Nena, “Mwina gawo lina la zimene muli kufuna kuti zidze msanga zili pafupi kudza.”
27_73: Ndipo, ndithudi, Ambuye wako ndi wokoma mtima kwa anthu, koma ambiri a iwo sathokoza ayi
27_74: Ndipo, ndithudi, Ambuye wako amadziwa zonse zimene zimabisika m’mitima mwawo ndiponso zonse zimene amaulula
27_75: Kulibe chinsinsi kumwamba kapena padziko lapansi chimene sichidalembedwe mu Buku lake lolemekezeka
27_76: Buku la Korani lili kuwauza ana a Israyeli zambiri zimene iwo amatsutsana
27_77: Ndipo limeneli ndi chenjezo ndiponso madalitso kwa anthu okhulupirira m’choonadi
27_78: Ndithudi Ambuye wako adzaweruza pakati pawo ndi chiweruzo chake. Iye ndiye Mwini mphamvu zonse ndi Mwini kudziwa za chinthu china chilichonse
27_79: Kotero iwe ika chikhulupiriro chako mwa Mulungu chifukwa iwe uli pa choonadi chenicheni
27_80: Ndithudi iwe siungathe kumupanga munthu wakufa kuti amve ndiponso siungathe kumupanga munthu osamva kuti amve kuitana kwako pamene iye atembenuka
27_81: Si udindo wako kutsogolera anthu a khungu kuti aleke kusochera. Palibe munthu amene adzakumvera kupatula okhawo amene amakhulupirira mu chivumbulutso chathu ndipo amadzipereka kwathunthu
27_82: Patsiku limene chiweruzo chathu chidzayandikira kwa osakhulupirira, Ife tidzawabweretsera chinyama chimene chidzayankhula nawo kuchokera ku dziko lapansi chifukwa munthu sanakhulupirire chivumbulutso chathu
27_83: Patsiku limeneli, tidzasonkhanitsa kuchokera ku mtundu uliwonse gululaanthuamenesadakhulupirirechivumbulutsochathu. Iwo adzasonkhanitsidwa ndi kuikidwa m’mizere
27_84: Mpaka pamene adzafike pamalo a chiweruzo, Mulungu adzati, “Kodi inu mudakana chivumbulutso changa ngakhale kuti inu simumadziwa chilichonse cha chivumbulutsocho? Kodi ndi chiyani mumachita?”
27_85: Chionongeko chidzadza pa iwo chifukwa cha zoipa zawo ndipo iwo adzasowa chowiringula
27_86: Kodi iwo saona mmene tidakonzera usiku kuti ukhale mpumulo ndi masana kuti uziwapatsa kuwala? Ndithudi mu zimenezi muli zizindikiro kwa anthu okhulupirira
27_87: Patsikulimeneli, lipengalidzalizidwandipoonseamene amakhala kumwamba ndi padziko lapansi adzagwidwa ndi mantha kupatula okhawo amene Mulungu adzafuna kuwapatula mu zimene zi. Onse adzabwera kwa Iye modzichepetsa
27_88: Iwe udzaona mapiri ndi kuwaganizira kuti ndi okhazikika koma iwo adzayenda ngati mmene mitambo imachitira. Uwu ndi mchitidwe wa Mulungu amene wakonza bwino lomwe chinthu chilichonse. Ndithudi Iye amadziwa bwino zonse zomwe mumachita
27_89: Iwo amene achita zabwino adzalandira mphotho imene ili yabwino ndipo adzakhala osakhudzidwa ndi zochititsa mantha za tsiku limeneli
27_90: Koma iwo amene achita zoipa adzaduduluzidwa pa mphumi zawo kunka ku moto. “Kodi inu simudzalandira malipiro ofanana ndi ntchito zanu?”
27_91: Nena, “Ine ndalamulidwa kutumikira Ambuye wa mzinda uno umene waupanga kuti ukhale Woyera. Zinthu zonse ndi zake. Ndipo ndalamulidwa kukhala mmodzi mwa odzipereka.”
27_92: Ndipo ndalamulidwa kuwerenga Buku la Korani. Aliyense amene atsatira njira yoyenera atero podzithandiza yekha. Kwa iye amene asochera nena “Ine si ndine kanthu kena koma mmodzi wa iwo ochenjeza anthu.”
27_93: Ndipo nena, “Kuyamikidwa kukhale kwa Mulungu! Iye adzakulangizani zizindikiro zake ndipo inu mudzazizindikira. Ambuye wanu saiwala zimene mumachita.”
28_2: Awa ndi mawu a m’Buku lofotokoza bwino
28_3: Tidzakuuza zina za mbiri ya Mose ndi Farawo mwachoonadi kuti uuze anthu okhulupirira
28_4: Ndithudi Farawo adadzikweza pa dziko lapansi ndipo adagawa anthu ake m’magulumagulu ndipo gulu lina iye anali kulizunza pomapha ana awo aamuna ndi kusiya ana aakazi. Ndithudi iye adali wochita zoipa
28_5: Koma chidali chifuniro chathu kuti tiwapatse zabwino anthu amene adali oponderezedwa pa dziko ndi kuwasandutsa iwo kukhala atsogoleri a anthu ndi kuwapanga iwo kulowa m’malo mwa ufumu wa Farawo
28_6: Ndikuwakhazikitsa m’dziko ndipo tinamupatsa Farawo, Hamani ndi gulu lawo la nkhondo zimene iwo anali kuopa
28_7: Ife tidauza amayi ake a Mose ponena kuti, “Muyamwitse iye koma ngati ukuda nkhawa za kukhala kwake mwamtendere, mponye mu mtsinje. Usaope ndipo usade nkhawa ayi chifukwa Ife tidzamubweretsa iye kwa iwe ndi kumupanga iye kukhala mmodzi wa Atumwi.”
28_8: Ndipo adamutola iye a banja la Farawo kuti akhoza kukhala mdani ndiponso madandaulo kwa iwo. Ndithudi Farawo, Hamani ndi Asirikali awo, onse adali ochimwa
28_9: Mkazi wake wa Farawo adati kwa iye, “Mwana uyu akhoza kubweretsa chisangalalo kwa ine ndi iwe. Musamuphe ayi. Mwina akhoza kutithandiza kapena tikhoza kumutenga kuti akhale mwana wathu.” Koma iwo sadadziwe chimene anali kuchita
28_10: Mtima wa amayi ake a Mose siumaganiza zina ayi koma za Mose yekha. Iye akadaulula za iye kukadapanda kuti Ife tidamupatsamphamvukutiapitirizekukhalawokhulupirira weniweni
28_11: Iye adati kwa mlongo wake wa Mose, “Pita umutsatire.” Iye anali kumuona kuchokera patali pamene iwo sadadziwe ayi
28_12: Tsopano Ife tidamupanga kuti azikana kuyamwa mawere a amayi ena. Mlongo wake adati kwa iwo, “Kodi ndingakulondorereni banja limene likhoza kumulera m’malo mwanu ndi kumusamala bwino?”
28_13: Ndipo tidamubweretsa iye kwa Amayi ake kuti asangalale, asiye kudandaula ndiponso kuti adziwe kuti lonjezo la Mulungu ndi loona. Koma anthu ambiri sachidziwa chimenechi
28_14: Ndipo pamene iye adakula msinkhu ndi kukhala munthu wokwana, tidamupatsa iye luntha ndi nzeru. Mmenemu ndi mmene timalipirira anthu ochita zabwino
28_15: Ndipo Iye adalowa mu mzinda, osaonedwa ndi anthu ndipo adapeza anthu awiri ali kumenyana, wina adali wa mtundu wake ndi wina wa mtundu wa adani ake. Munthu wa mtundu wake adamupempha iye chithandizo kuti agonjetse mdani wake. Ndipo Mose adamumenya mdani wake ndi dzanja lake ndipo adamupha. Mose adati, “Iyi ndi ntchito ya Satana. Ndithudi Iye ndi mdani wa munthu wosokoneza kwenikweni.”
28_16: Iye adati, “Ambuye! Ine ndidalakwira mzimu wanga kotero ndikhululukireni.” Ndipo Mulungu anamukhululukira iye chifukwa Iye ndi Mwini kukhululukira ndi Mwini chisoni chosatha
28_17: Iye adati, “Chifukwa cha chifundo chimene mwandionetsa Ambuye, ine ndili kulumbira kuti sindidzathandiza wina aliyense wochita zoipa.”
28_18: M’mawa mwake iye anali kuyenda mu mzinda ndi mantha poyembekezera mavuto. Munthu uja, amene amamuthandiza cha dzulo, adamuitananso kuti amuthandize. Mose adati, “Ndi choonekeratu kuti iwe ndiwe munthu wosokoneza.”
28_19: Ndipo pamene Mose ankati azim’menya mdani uja, munthuyo adati, “Iwe Mose! Kodi ufuna kundipha monga momwe unaphera munthu uja dzulo? Ndithudi iwe ufuna kukhala munthu wankhanza m’dziko lino ndiponso iwe siufuna kukhala mmodzi mwa anthu angwiro.”
28_20: Ndipo munthu wina adadza kuchokera ku malire a mzinda ali kuthamanga. Iye adati, “Mose! Anthu ndi mafumu ali kuchita upo woti akuphe iwe. Tuluka mu mzindawu. Ine ndili kukulangiza iwe mwachoonadi.”
28_21: Iye adachoka ku Aiguputo mwamantha, ali kuyembekeza kuti zoipa zim’peza. Anali akunena kuti, “Ambuye, ndipulumutseni ku anthu oipa.”
28_22: Ndipo pamene anali kuyandikira ku Midiyani Iye adati, “Ambuye anditsogolera ku njira yoyenera.”
28_23: Ndipo pamene adafika pa chitsime cha ku Midiyani, iye adapeza gulu la anthu aamuna amene adali kumwetsa ziweto zawo. Ndipo kuonjezera paiwo, padali akazi awiri amene anali kungosunga nkhosa zawo. Mose adati, “Kodi vuto lanu ndi chiyani?” Iwo adati, “Sitingathe kumwetsa nkhosa zathu pokhapokha abusa awa atachotsa ziweto zawo. Ndipo bambo wathu ndi munthu wokalamba.”
28_24: Mose adawamwetsera nkhosa zawo ndipo adachoka ndi kukakhala pa m’thunzi nati, “Ambuye, ine ndili kusowa zabwino zimene munganditumize.”
28_25: Mmodzi mwa akazi aja adadza kwa iye akuyenda mwamanyazi nati, “Abambo anga ali kukuitanani kuti akakulipireni chifukwa chomwetsera ziweto zathu.” Ndipo pamene Mose adadza kwa iwo, adafotokoza nkhani yake kwa iye. Bambo uja adati, “Usaope. Tsopano wapulumuka m’manja mwa anthu oipa.”
28_26: Mmodzi mwa akazi aja adati, “Atate, mulembeni ntchito munthu uyu. Munthu wabwino kumulemba ntchito ndi amene ali ndi mphamvu ndiponso wokhulupirika.”
28_27: Atate adati, “Ine ndidzakupatsa mmodzi wa ana anga aakazi kuti umukwatire ngati ungakhale zaka zisanu ndi zitatu uli kundigwirira ntchito. Koma ngati ufuna ukhoza kugwira ntchito zaka khumi. Ine sindifuna kukuzunza ayi. Ngati Mulungu afuna, udzaona kuti ine ndine munthu wangwiro.”
28_28: Mose adati, “Zimenezi zikhale pakati pa inu ndi ine. Mwa nthawi ziwirizi ine ndidzakwaniritsa ndipo pasadzakhale cholakwa kwa ine. Ndipo Mulungu ndi mboni pa zimene tili kukambiranazi.”
28_29: Ndipo pamene adamaliza nthawi yake, iye anali kupita ndi mkazi wake. Mose adaona moto kuonjezera pa phiri la Sinai. Iye adati kwa mkazi wake, “Khala pano chifukwa ndili kuona moto. Mwina mwake ndikhoza kubweretsa kuchokera kumeneko nkhani kapena mwatso woyaka umene ukhoza kuotha.”
28_30: Ndipo pamene adafika pamalo paja, iye adaitanidwa kuchokera kumbali ya manja ya chigwa pa malo odalitsika kuchokera mumtengo. “oh iwe Mose! Ndithudi, Ine ndine Mulungu, Ambuye wa zolengedwa zonse.”
28_31: “Ndipo ponya pansi ndodo yako.” Ndipo pamene adaona ndodo yake ili kuyenda ngati njoka, adatembenuka nathawa osabwevukanso. “Iwe Mose! Bwerera ndipo usaope. Iwe ndiwe mmodzi wa anthu otetezedwa.”
28_32: “Ika dzanja lako m’thumba, ndipo ilo lidzakhala loyera kwambiri lopanda chilema ndipo ika dzanja lako pamtima pako kuti uchoke mantha. Kotero zimenezi ndi zizindikiro ziwiri za Ambuye wako kwa Farao ndi mafumu ake. Mosakaika iwo ndi anthu osakhulupirira.”
28_33: Mose adati, “Ambuye wanga! Ine ndidapha mmodzi mwa anthu awo ndipo ndili ndi mantha kuti mwina akhoza kukandipha.”
28_34: “Ndipo Aroni, m’bale wanga, amayankhula bwino kuposa ine. Mutumizeni iye pamodzi ndi ine kuti akhoza kukandithandiza kuti akandiyankhulire. Ndithudi ine ndiopa kuti akandikana.”
28_35: Iye adati, “Ife tidzakuonjezera mphamvu pokhala ndi m’bale wako ndipo ndiika pa inu awiri umboni ndipo iwo sadzatha kukupwetekani inu chifukwa cha zizindikiro zathu. Inu pamodzi ndi onse amene amakutsatirani mudzapambana.”
28_36: Ndipo pamene Mose adadza kwa iwo ndi zizindikiro zathu zooneka, iwo adati, “Izi si zina ayi koma matsenga ongopeka ndiponso ife sitidamvepo kuti za mtundu uwu zinachitikapo kuchokera kwa makolo athu akale.”
28_37: Ndipo Mose adati, “Ambuye wanga amadziwa bwinobwino munthu amene amabweretsa chilangizo chochokera kwa Iye, ndiponso kwa amene tsogolo lake ndi labwino. Ndithudi anthu onse ochimwa sadzapambana ayi.”
28_38: Farawo adati, “oh inu mafumu! Inu mulibe mulungu wina amene ine ndimudziwa kupatula ine ndekha. Haman, ndipangireni ine njerwa zadothi ndipo mundimangire nyumba yaitali, yonga nsanja, kuti ndikwerepo kupita kwa Mulungu wa Mose. Ndithudi ine ndili kumuganizira kuti Mose ndi mmodzi mwa anthu abodza.”
28_39: Farawo ndi Asirikali ake adadzikweza kwambiri mu dziko la Aiguputo popanda chifukwa ndipo iwo anali kuganiza kuti sadzabwereranso kwa Ife
28_40: Ndipo tidamutenga iye pamodzi ndi asirikali ake ndipo tidawamiza m’nyanja. Ganiza chimene amaona anthu ochita zoipa
28_41: Ife tidawapanga iwo kukhala atsogoleri oitana anthu kuti apite kumoto koma pa tsiku la kuuka kwa akufa, palibe mmodzi amene adzawathandiza iwo
28_42: Ife tidawatsatira ndi matemberero m’dziko lino ndipo pa tsiku la kuuka kwa akufa iwo adzakhala anthu onyozeka
28_43: Ndipo ife tidaononga mibadwo yoyamba yakale ndipo tidamupatsa Mose Buku la Chipangano Chakale monga nyali, langizo ndi chifundo kwa anthu kuti mwina akhoza kuchenjezedwa
28_44: Iwe kudalibe, ku mbali ya kumadzulo kwa phiri, pamene Ife tinali kumupatsa Mose udindo wake ndiponso iwe kunalibe pa mwambowu
28_45: Koma Ife tidalenga mibadwo yambiri Mose atafa kale imene inali ndi moyo wautali. Iwe siunakhale pakati pa anthu a ku Midiyani ndi kumawalakatulira chivumbulutso chathu. Koma Ife ndi amene timatumiza Atumwi
28_46: Ndipo iwe kudalibe m’mbali mwa phiri la Sinai pamene tidamuitana Mose. Koma adali madalitso ochokera kwa Ambuye wako kuti ukachenjeze mtundu wa anthu umene unalipo iwe usanadze kotero kuti akhoza kuchenjezedwa
28_47: Tikanapanda kukutumiza iwe ndipo mazunzo akadawagwera chifukwa cha ntchito zawo zoipa, iwo akadati, “Ambuye, chifukwa chiyani simudatitumizire Mtumwi kotero kuti tikadatsatira mawu anu ndiponso tikadakhala okhulupirira.”
28_48: Ndipo pamene choonadi chadza kwa iwo kuchokera kwa Ife, iwo ali kufunsa kuti, “Kodi ndi chifukwa chiyani iye sadapatsidwe monga zomwe zidapatsidwa kwa Mose?” Kodi iwo sadakane zimene zidapatsidwa kwa Mose kale? Iwo amati, “Zizindikiro ziwiri za matsenga zili zothandizana.” Ndiponso amanena, “Ife sitidzakhulupirira mu china chilichonse cha zimenezi.”
28_49: Nena, “Bweretsani Buku lochokera kwa Mulungu limene lili ndi langizo labwino kuposa malangizo awa ndipo ine ndidzatsatira ngati zimene muli kunena ndi zoona.”
28_50: Ngati iwo akanika kukuyankha, dziwa kuti iwo ali kutsatira zilakolako zawo. Kodi ndani amene ali wolakwa kwambiri kuposa munthu amene amatsatira zilakolako zake opanda langizo la Mulungu? Ndithudi Mulungu satsogolera anthu olakwa
28_51: Ndithudi tatumiza mawu athu motsatana kwa iwo kuti akhoze kuchenjezedwa
28_52: Iwo amene kale tidawapatsa Buku lino lisadadze, amakhulupirira mwa ilo
28_53: Pamene limalakatulidwa kwa iwo, amati iwowo “Ife tili kulikhulupirira Bukuli chifukwa ndi choonadi chochokera kwa Ambuye wathu. Ife tidadzipereka kwathunthu kalekale mawu awa asadadze.”
28_54: Anthu awa mphotho yawo idzaperekedwa kwa iwo kawiri chifukwa iwo adapirira ndipo amagonjetsa choipa pochita chabwino ndi kumapereka gawo la chaulere pa katundu amene tidawapatsa
28_55: Ndipo iwo akamva mawu oipa, salabadira zonenazo koma amati, “Ife tili ndi ntchito zathu ndipo nanunso muli ndi ntchito zanu. Mtendere ukhale kwa inu. Ife sitifuna kugwirizana ndi anthu osadziwa.”
28_56: Iwe siungamutsogolere aliyense amene umufuna. Ndi Mulungu yekha amene amatsogolera aliyense amene Iye wamufuna. Iye amadziwa bwino anthu amene ali oyenera
28_57: Iwo amati, “Ngati ife titsatira chilangizo chako, ife tikuopakulandidwadzikolathu.”KodiIfesitidawakhazikire malo otetezedwa kumene zipatso za mtundu uliwonse zimaperekedwa ngati chakudya kuchokera kwa Ife? Ndithudi ambiri a iwo ndi anthu osadziwa
28_58: Kodi ndi mizinda ingati imene tidaononga imene idali kunyada chifukwa cha chuma chake? Kotero zimenezi ndizo nyumba zawo zimene sadakhalitsemo ndipo tsopano eni ake ndife
28_59: Ndipo Ambuye wako sadaononge mizinda mpaka pamene Iye adadzutsa kuchokera mu iyo, Mtumwi amene amalalikira za chivumbulutso chathu ndipo Ife sitidzaononga mzinda pokhapokha anthu okhala mmenemo ali olakwa
28_60: Zinthu zimene mwapatsidwa si zina koma chakudya ndiponso chionetsero chopanda pake cha m’moyo uno. Koma chimene chili ndi Mulungu ndicho chabwino ndiponso chokhalitsa. Kodi simungathe kuzindikira
28_61: Kodi anthu awiriwa ndi ofanana? Iye amene tamulonjeza lonjezo labwino ndipo adzalikwaniritsa ndi iye amene tamupatsa zokoma zambiri za m’moyo uno koma pa tsiku lachiweruzo adzakhala m’gulu la iwo olangidwa
28_62: Pa tsiku limeneli Mulungu adzawaitana ndipo adzati, “Kodi aja munkati ndi anzanga ali kuti?”
28_63: Iwo amene adzapezeka ndi mlandu wotere adzati, “Awa ndiwo anthu amene ife tidawasocheretsa. Ife tidawasocheretsa chifukwa nafenso tidali osochera. Ife tsopano tadzipatula (kuchoka mwa iwo) ndi kudza kwa inu. Si ndife amene iwo anali kupembedza.”
28_64: Ndipo kudzanenedwa kwa iwo kuti, “Itanani anzanu kuti akuthandizeni.” Iwo adzawaitana koma iwo sadzawamva ayi. Ndipo iwo adzalawa chilango chowawa. Iwo adzafunitsitsa akadatsogozedwa bwino
28_65: Tsiku limene Mulungu adzawaitana nati, “Kodi inu mudanena zotani kwa Mtumwi?”
28_66: Zodandaula zawo sizidzamveka ayi, kotero sadzatha kufunsana wina ndi mnzake
28_67: Akakhala iye amene alapa zoipa zake nakhulupirira ndipo achita ntchito zabwino, mwina akhoza kudzakhala pakati pa anthu opambana
28_68: Ndipo Ambuye wako amalenga ndi kusankha aliyense amene Iye wamufuna. Kusankha si kwawo ayi. Ulemerero ukhale kwa Mulungu ndipo Iye atalikirane ndi zimene amamufanizira nazo
28_69: Ambuye wako amadziwa zonse zimene amazibisa m’mitima mwawo ndiponso zimene amaziulula
28_70: Iye ndi Mulungu ndipo palibenso mulungu wina koma Iye yekha. Kuyamikidwa konse ndi kwake m’moyo uno ndiponso m’moyo umene uli nkudza. Ndipo chake ndi chiweruzo ndipo kwa Iye mudzabwerera
28_71: Nena, “Ndiuzeni! Ngati Mulungu atapanga usiku kuti usache mpaka pa tsiku louka kwa akufa, kodi ndi mulungu uti kupatula Mulungu weniweni amene akhoza kukupatsani usana? Kodi simukumva?”
28_72: Nena, “Ndiuzeni! Ngati Mulungu atapanga usana kuti kusade mpaka pa tsiku louka kwa akufa, kodi ndi mulungu uti kupatula Mulungu weniweni amene akhoza kukupatsani usiku umene inu mumapumulamo? Kodi inu simukuona?”
28_73: Mwachifundo chake wakupatsani usiku ndi usana kuti muzipezamo mpumulo ndi kufunafuna chisomo chake ndi kuti muzithokoza
28_74: Ndipo pa tsiku limene adzawaitana iwo nati, “Kodi ali kuti iwo amene mumaganiza kuti ndi anzanga?”
28_75: Ndipo nthawi yomweyo tidzaitana mboni kuchokera ku mtundu uliwonse ndipo tidzati, “Bweretsani umboni wanu.” Nthawi imeneyo adzadziwa kuti mwini wake choonadi ndi Mulungu ndipo zonse zimene amapeka zidzawathawira
28_76: Ndithudi Karuni, mosakayika, adali wa ku mtundu wa Mose. Koma iye amawanyoza iwo chifukwa Ife tidamupatsa nkhokwe za chuma zimene ndithudi makiyi ake samatheka kunyamulidwa ndi anthu angapo a mphamvu. Anthu ake adati kwa iye, “Usadzikundikire chifukwa Mulungu sakonda anthu odzikundikira chifukwa cha chuma.”
28_77: “Koma ufunefune, kudzera m’zimene Mulungu wakupatsa iwe, kuti upeze moyo umene uli nkudza, ndiponso usaiwale udindo wako m’dziko lino. Khala wabwino monga Mulungu wakuonetsera ubwino wake. Ndipo usalimbike pochita zoipa padziko lapansi chifukwa Mulungu sakonda anthu ochita zoipa.”
28_78: Iye adati, “Chuma ichi chidapatsidwa kwa ine chifukwa cha nzeru zanga.” Kodi iye sadadziwe kuti Mulungu adaononga m’badwo wonse wa anthu amene adali ndi mphamvu zambiri ndiponso olemera kwambiri iye asanabadwe? Anthu ochita zoipa sadzafunsidwa za machimo awo
28_79: Kotero iye adapita kwa anthu ake monyadira atavala bwino. Anthu amene adali kukonda moyo wa pa dziko lapansi adati, “Tikadakhala kuti tidali nazo ngati zinthu zimene zili ndi Karuni! Ndithudi iye ndi wolemera kwambiri.”
28_80: Koma iye amene adapatsidwa nzeru adati: “Tsoka kwa inu! Mphotho ya Mulungu m’moyo umene uli nkudza ndi yabwino kwa iwo amene amakhulupirira ndipo amachita zabwino.” Koma mphothoyo palibe amene adzailandira kupatula okhawo amene amapirira
28_81: Kotero Ife tidalamulira nthaka kuti imumeze Karuni pamodzi ndi chuma chake ndipo sadapeze wina womuthandiza kwa Mulungu ndipo iye sadathe kudziteteza
28_82: Ndipo iwo amene anali kukhumbira chuma chake chadzulo adayamba kunena kuti, “Taonani! Mulungu amapereka moolowa manja kwa aliyense amene wamufuna ndi monyalapsa kwa aliyense amene Iye wamufuna. Akadakhala kuti sadatilangize ife chisoni chake, Iye akadalamulira nthaka kuti itimeze. Taonani! anthu okana Mulungu sadzakhala opambana ngakhale pang’ono.”
28_83: Kunena za m’moyo umene uli nkudza, udzakhala wa iwo amene sadzikweza pa dziko lapansi kapena kuchita zoipa. Ndipo mapeto abwino ndi a iwo amene ali angwiro
28_84: Aliyense amene achita zabwino adzalipidwa zochuluka. Koma iye amene achita zoipa ndiponso iwo amene achita ntchito zoipa adzangolipidwa molingana ndi zimene anali kuchita
28_85: Ndithudi Iye amene adalamulira Buku la Korani kuti livumbulutsidwe kwa iwe adzakubwezera kumalo komwe udzapite. Nena, “Ambuye wanga adziwa bwino iye amene amabweretsa langizo loonadi ndiponso iye amene ndi wosochera.”
28_86: Ndipo iwe siumayembekezera kuti Buku lolemekezeka lidzavumbulitsidwa kwa iwe koma ndi chifundo chochokera kwa Ambuye wako. Kotero usavomereze zochita za anthu omwe ali osakhulupirira
28_87: Usalole wina aliyense kuti akubweze ku chivumbulutso cha Mulungu pamene chavumbulutsidwa kwa iwe ndipo aitane anthu kuti adze kwa Ambuye wako ndipo usakhale m’gulu la anthu amene amaphatikiza milungu ina ndi Mulungu weniweni
28_88: Ndipo usamphatikize mulungu wina ndi Mulungu weniweni. Kulibe mulungu wina koma Iye yekha. Zinthu zonse ndi zakutha kupatula Iye yekha. Chake ndi chiweruzo ndipo kwa Iye ndi kumene mudzabwerera
29_2: Kodi anthu amaganiza kuti adzasiyidwa okha osayesedwa chifukwa anena kuti, “Ife ndife okhulupirira?”
29_3: Ndipo ndithudi Ife tidawayesa anthu amene adalipo iwo asanadze. Ndithudi Mulungu adzawazindikira iwo amene ndi olungama, ndipo ndithudi, adzawazindikira iwo amene ndi abodza
29_4: Kodi kapena iwo amene amachita zoipa amaganiza kuti	adzatithawa	ife?	Iwo	amaweruza	molakwa
29_5: Aliyense amene amakhulupirira kuti adzakumana ndi Mulungu nthawi imene Mulungu adakhazikitsa, ndithudi, idzabwera ndipo Iye ndi wakumva ndi wodziwa
29_6: Ndipo aliyense amene adzipereka kwathunthu, akudzipereka podzithandiza iye mwini. Ndithudi Mulungu ndi woima payekha ndipo Iye safuna thandizo lochokera kwa zolengedwa zake
29_7: Ndipo iwo amene amakhulupirira ndipo amachita ntchito zabwino, Ife tidzawakhululukira machimo awo ndikuwapatsa malipiro ofanana ndi ntchito zawo zabwino
29_8: Ndipo Ife tidamulamula munthu kuonetsa ubwino kwa makolo ake koma ngati iwo akuuza kuti uzindiphatikiza Ine ndi ena ake amene iwe siuwazindikira, usawamvere ayi. Kwa Ine ndiko mudzabwerera ndipo ndidzakuuzani zimene munali kuchita
29_9: Ndipo iwo amene akhulupirira ndi kumachita ntchito zabwino, ndithudi, Ife tidzawaika m’gulu la anthu angwiro
29_10: Ndipo pakati pa anthu pali iye amene amati, “Ife timakhulupirira mwa Mulungu.” Koma akangoona mavuto chifukwa chodzipereka kwa Mulungu, amaganiza kuti kuponderezedwa kwawo ndi anthu ndi mkwiyo wochokera kwa Mulungu! Ndipo ngati thandizo lidza kwa iwe kuchokera kwa Ambuye wako, ndithudi, iwo adzati, “Ife tidali kumbali yako.” Kodi mukuganiza kuti Mulungu sadziwa zonse zimene zili m’mitima mwawo pakati pa zolengedwa zake zonse
29_11: Ndithudi Mulungu amawadziwa anthu onse okhulupirira ndi anthu onse a chinyengo
29_12: Ndipo anthu osakhulupirira amanena kwa anthu okhulupirira kuti, “Tsatirani njira yathu ndipo ife tidzavomera chilango chifukwa cha kuchimwa kwanu. Iwo sadzavomera chilango china chilichonse m’malo mwawo. Ndithudi iwo ndi abodza
29_13: Iwo adzanyamula mtolo wawo pamodzi ndi mitolo ina ndi yawo. Ndipo patsiku lachiweruzo iwo adzafunsidwa kufotokoza mabodza awo
29_14: Ndipo ndithudi tidamutumiza Nowa kwa anthu ake ndipo adakhala pakati pawo zaka chikwi chimodzi kuchotsapo zaka makumi asanu. Ndipo chigumula chidawapeza ali pa uchimo
29_15: Kotero tidamupulumutsa iye pamodzi ndi iwo amene adali naye m’chombo ndipo tidachipanga icho kukhala phunziro kwa anthu a mitundu yonse
29_16: Ndipo Ife tidamupulumutsa Abrahamu pamene adati kwa anthu ake, “Pembedzani Mulungu ndipo muzimuopa Iye. Chimenecho chidzakhala chinthu chabwino kwa inu ngati mukadazindikira.”
29_17: Chifukwa inu mumapembedza mafano oonjezera pa Mulungu ndipo inu mumapeka bodza. Zinthu zimene mumapembedza zoonjezera pa Mulungu zilibemphamvuzokupatsanizofunazanu.Koteropemphani zofuna zanu kwa Mulungu ndipo muzimuthokoza Iye. Kwa Iye ndiko kumene mudzabwerera
29_18: Ndipo ngati inu mukana uthenga dziwani kuti nawonso amene adalipo inu musanadze adachita chimodzimodzi. Ndipo udindo wa Mtumwi ndi kulalikira pagulu momveka
29_19: Iwo sakuona mmene Mulungu amayambitsira chilengedwe ndiponso mmene amachibwerezanso. Ndithudi zimenezo ndi za pafupi kwa Mulungu
29_20: Nena, “Yendani paliponse pa dziko lapansi ndipo muone mmene Mulungu adayambitsira chilengedwe. Kotero Mulungu adzalenga chilengedwe chinanso. Mulungu ali ndi mphamvu pa chinthu china chilichonse.”
29_21: Iye amalanga aliyense amene wamufuna ndiponso amaonetsa chifundo chake kwa aliyense amene wamufuna. Ndipo ndi kwa Iye kumene nonse mudzabwerera
29_22: Kaya ndi pa dziko lapansi kapena kumwamba, kulibe kumene inu mungathawire. Ndipo inu mulibe wina kupatula Mulungu amene angakutetezeni kapena kukuthandizani
29_23: onse amene amakana zizindikiro za Mulungu ndiponso zokumana naye m’moyo umene uli nkudza ndiwo amene amakayika za chifundo changa. Ndipo iwo adzalandira chilango chowawa kwambiri
29_24: Yankho la anthu a Abrahamu lidali lamwano ndipo adati, “Mumuphe kapena mumutenthe.” Koma Mulungu adamupulumutsa iye ku moto. Ndithudi mu zimenezi muli phunziro kwa anthu okhulupirira
29_25: Ndipo iye adati, “Inu mwasankha kupembedza mafano kuonjezera pa Mulungu weniweni chifukwa chokweza mgwirizano wa pakati panu m’moyo uno. Koma pa tsiku lachiweruzo inu mudzakanana wina ndi mnzake. Ndipo malo anu akakhala ku moto ndipo inu simudzakhala ndi wina wokuthandizani.”
29_26: Koma Loti adamukhulupirira iye. Iye adati, “Ndidzachoka pa nyumba yanga chifukwa cha Ambuye wanga chifukwa Iye ndi wamphamvu zambiri ndi wanzeru.”
29_27: Ndipo tidamupatsa Abrahamu, Isake ndiYakobo ndipo tidakhazikitsa pakati pa ana ake utumiki ndi chivumbulutso. Ndipo Ife tidamupatsa mphotho yake m’moyo uno ndipo iye adzakhala m’moyo umene uli nkudza, pagulu la anthu olungama
29_28: Ndipo tidatumiza Loti, kotero iye adati kwa anthu ake, “Inu muli kuchita zinthu zonyansa zimene sizidachitikeponso ndi mtundu wa anthu kuyambira kalekale.”
29_29: “Kodi inu mumakaputa anthu a aamuna ndi kuchita chifwamba m’misewu ndiponso mumaphunzitsa zoipa ngakhale m’magulu anu?” Iwo sadayankhe china chilichonse kupatula kuti iwo adati, “Bweretsa pa ife chilango cha Mulungu ngati iwe ukunena zoona.”
29_30: Iye adati, “Ambuye wanga! Thandizeni polimbana ndi anthu oipawa.”
29_31: Ndipo pamene Atumwi athu adadza kwa Abrahamu, ndi nkhani ya bwino, iwo adati, “Ndithudi ife tidzaononga anthu a mu mzinda uno chifukwa anthu ake ndi osalungama.”
29_32: Iye adati, “Ndithudi mu mzindamo muli Loti.” Iwo adati, “Ife tikudziwa amene ali m’menemo. Ndithudi ife tidzamupulumutsa iye ndi omutsatira ake onse kupatula mkazi wake. Iye adzakhala m’gulu la anthu otsalira.”
29_33: Ndipo pamene Atumwi athu adadza kwa Loti, iye anada nkhawa pa zimene zingawachitikire iwo ndipo iye adaoneka wopanda mphamvu yowateteza iwo. Ndipo iwo adati, “Usaope kapena kuda nkhawa. Ndithudi ife tidzakupulumutsa iwe pamodzi ndi okutsatira ako kupatula mkazi wako. Iye adzakhala m’gulu la anthu otsalira.”
29_34: Ndithudi Ife tidzatsitsa chilango kuchokera kumwamba, kuti chilange anthu a mzinda uno chifukwa cha machimo awo
29_35: Ndithudi Ife tasiya chiphunzitso chokwanira kwa anthu ozindikira
29_36: Ndipo kwa anthu a ku Midiyani tidatumiza m’bale wawo Shaibu ndipo iye adati, “oh anthu anga! Tumikirani Mulungu ndipo opani tsiku limene lili nkudza ndipo musayambitse chisokonezo m’dziko pochita zinthu zoipa.”
29_37: Koma iwo adamukana iye, kotero chivomezi chachikulu chidadza pa iwo ndipo mitembo yawo idali lambilambi m’nyumba zawo
29_38: Ndi Aad ndi Thamoud. Chitsimikizo chake chili m’mabanja a m’mizindayi. Satana adawapangitsa kuganiza kuti ntchito zawo zoipa zidali zabwino ndipo iye adawabweza ku njira yoyenera ngakhale kuti iwo adali anthu anzeru ndi aluntha
29_39: Ndipo Ife tidaononga Karuni, Farawo ndi Hamani. Ndithudi Mose adadza kwa iwo ndi chiphunzitso chabwino koma iwo anali kukhala mwamwano m’dziko ngakhale kuti iwo sakadatha kutigonjetsa Ife
29_40: Kotero tidalanga aliyense chifukwa cha machimo ake. Pakati pa iwo padali iwo amene tidawatumizira mvula yamkuntho, ndipo pakati pawo padali iwo amene adavutika ndi mphenzi, ndipo pakati pawo padalinso iwo amene adamezedwa ndi nthaka ndipo padalinso iwo amene tidawamiza ndipo Mulungu sadalakwe ayi koma iwo ndiwo amene adalakwira mizimu yawo
29_41: Fanizo la iwo amene amasankha owateteza kuonjezera pa Mulungu ndi Kangaude amene amamanga nyumba yake yaulusi. Ndipo ndithudi iwo akadayenera kudziwa kuti nyumba ya Kangaude ndi imodzi mwa nyumba zosalimba
29_42: Ndithudi Mulungu amadziwa chilichonse chimene iwo amapembedza kuonjezera pa Iye ndipo Iye ndi wamphamvu ndi wanzeru
29_43: Ndipo zitsanzozi tili kuziulula chifukwa cha anthu koma palibe amene amazizindikira koma ophunzira okha
29_44: Mulungu adalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi mwachoonadi. Ndithudi muli phunziro mu zimenezi kwa anthu okhulupirira
29_45: Lakatula zimene zavumbulutsidwa kwa iwe kuchokera m’Bukundipopitirizakupemphera. Ndithudimapemphero amateteza munthu ku machimo ndi zinthu zoipa. Ndithudi kukumbukira Mulungu ndi chinthu chachikulu ndipo Mulungu amadziwa zonse zimene mumachita
29_46: Ndipo musatsutsane ndi anthu okhulupirira za m’Buku pokhapokha kutakhala koyenera kutero, kupatula okhawo amene amachita zoipa. Nena, “Ife timakhulupirira mu izo zimene zavumbulutsidwa kwa ife ndi zimene zidavumbulutsidwa kwa inu ndipo Mulungu wathu ndi Mulungu wanu ndi mmodzi ndipo ife tadzipereka kwa Iye.”
29_47: Ndipokotero Ifetavumbulutsa Bukulolemekezekakwa iwe. Kotero onse amene tawapatsa Buku amakhulupirira mwa ilo ndipo palibe amene amakana chivumbulutso chathu kupatula anthu osalungama
29_48: Ndipo iwe siudalakatule za m’Buku lina ili lisanadze. Ndipo iwe siudalembe Buku lina lililonse ndi manja ako. Zikadatero, ndithudi, anthu oyankhula zachabechabe akadakayika
29_49: Iyayi! Izi ndi ziphunzitso zomveka zimene zili m’mitima ya iwo amene adapatsidwa nzeru ndipo palibe amene amakana chiphunzitso chathu kupatula wosalungama
29_50: Iwo amati, “Bwanji Ambuye wake sadamupatse zizindikiro?” Nena, ” Zizindikiro zonse zili ndi Mulungu ndipo ine ndine mchenjezi chabe.”
29_51: Kodi sizidakwanire kuti tavumbulutsa Buku lolemekezeka kwa iwe limene lili kuwerengedwa kwa iwo? Ndithudi m’Bukuli muli chifundo ndi chikumbutso kwa anthu okhulupirira
29_52: Nena, “Mulungu ndi mboni yokwana pakati pa ine ndi inu. Iye amadziwa chimene chili kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi.” Ndipo iwo amene amakhulupirira zabodza, ndiponso sakhulupirira mwa Mulungu, amenewa, ndi anthu olephera
29_53: Iwo amakukakamiza kuti ubweretse chilango msanga. Ndipo zikadakhala kuti nthawi yake siidakhazikitsidwe kale, ndithudi, chilango chikadakhala chitadza kale pa iwo. Ndithudi icho chidzadza pa iwo mwadzidzidzi pamene iwo sali kuchiganizira
29_54: Iwo ali kukukakamiza kuti ubweretse chilango. Ndithudi Gahena idzadzadza ndi anthu osakhulupirira
29_55: Patsiku limene chilango chidzadza pa iwo kuchokera kumwamba ndi padziko lapansi mawu adzati, “Lawani inu zipatso za ntchito zanu.”
29_56: oh inu akapolo anga amene mwakhulupirira! Ndithudi dziko langa lili ndi malo ambiri. Kotero ndipembedzeni Ine ndekha
29_57: Mzimu uliwonse udzalawa imfa. Pomaliza nonse mudzabwererakwa Ife
29_58: Ndipoiwoameneamakhulupirira ndipo amachita ntchito zabwino, otere tidzawapatsa malo kumwamba amene pansi pake pamayenda mitsinje kuti akhale m’menemo mpaka kale kale. Eti kukoma mphotho ya iwo amene amachita zabwino
29_59: Iwo amapirira ndipo amaika chikhulupiriro chawo mwa Ambuye wawo ndi Mtetezi wawo
29_60: Kodi zilipo zolengedwa zingati zimene sizisunga chakudya chawo? Ndi Mulungu amene amazidyetsa izo pamodzi ndi inu nomwe. Ndipo Iye ndi wakumva ndi wodziwa
29_61: Ndithudi ngati iwe utawafunsa kuti kodi ndani amene adalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi ndiponso amene adalamula dzuwa ndi mwezi kumvera malamulo ake? Ndithudi iwo adzayankha kuti ndi Mulungu. Nanga ndi chifukwa chiyani iwo amakana choonadi
29_62: Mulungu amapereka moolowa manja kwa aliyense amene Iye wamufuna ndipo amamana aliyense amene Iye wamufuna. Ndithudi Mulungu amadziwa chinthu china chilichonse
29_63: Ngati iwe ungawafunse kuti kodi ndani amene amagwetsa mvula ndipo amapereka moyo ku nthaka imene idali ya kufa? Ndithudi iwo adzayankha kuti, “Ndi Mulungu.” Nena “Kuyamikidwa konse kukhale kwa Iye.” Iyayi, ambiri a iwo sazindikira
29_64: Ndipo moyo wa padziko lapansi siuli kanthu koma masewera ndi kongotayira nthawi. Ukakhala moyo umene uli nkudza, umenewo ndiwo weniweni, iwo akadadziwa
29_65: Kotero iwo akamakwera zombo amapempha kwa Mulungu modzipereka ndi modzichepetsa. Koma Iye akawafikitsa pa mtunda mwaubwino, Ah! iwo amamufanizira Iye ndi zina zake
29_66: Kotero iwo amaonetsa kusathokoza pa zimene tawapatsa kuti akhoza kusangalala; ndipo iwo adzazindikira posachedwapa
29_67: Kodi iwo saona kuti tateteza malo odalitsika pamene anthu ena ali kutengedwa mwankhanza pa malo owazungulira? Kodi iwo adzakhala ali kukhulupirirabe zabodza ndi kukana ubwino wa Mulungu
